versions.version_description: My version uses easier chords for beginners. It can be transposed to a lower key by removing the capo.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[tab][Intro]
[ch]Bm7[/ch]          [ch]Amaj7[/ch]
Do-do-do-do, do-do-do-do[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#7[/ch]
   Oh, not another take[/tab]


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]
Oh, it's like that[/tab]

I'm your dream come true
[tab]               [ch]Amaj7[/ch]           [ch]F#7[/ch]
When it's on a platter for you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]
Then you pulled back[/tab]

When I try to make plans
[tab]              [ch]Amaj7[/ch]               [ch]F#7[/ch]
More than two hours in advance, hmm[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]
I  slam the door, I hit ignore[/tab]
[tab][ch]Amaj7[/ch]          [ch]F#7[/ch]
I    say, "no, no, no, no, no more"[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]
I  got you blocked after this, an afterthought[/tab]
[tab][ch]Amaj7[/ch]       [ch]F#7[/ch]
I    finally cut you off[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]                                                   [ch]Amaj7[/ch] [ch]F#7[/ch]
I feel so much lighter like a feather with you off my mind, ah[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]
Floatin' through the memories, like whatever[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Amaj7[/ch] [ch]F#7[/ch]
You're a waste of time, ah[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Bm7[/ch]
Your signals are mixed, you act like a bitch[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Amaj7[/ch]           [ch]F#7[/ch]
You fit every stereotype, "send a pic"[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]                                                   [ch]Amaj7[/ch]
I feel so much lighter like a feather with you out my life[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#7[/ch]
   With you out my life[/tab]


[tab][Post-Chorus]
[ch]Bm7[/ch]          [ch]Amaj7[/ch]
Do-do-do-do, do-do-do-do[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]F#7[/ch]
Like a feather, like a feather, like a feather[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]                                   [ch]Amaj7[/ch]       [ch]F#7[/ch]
It feels so good not carin' where you are tonight[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Bm7[/ch]                                      [ch]Amaj7[/ch]         [ch]F#7[/ch]
And it feels so good not pretendin' to like the wine you like[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]
I  slam the door (Slam the door), I hit ignore (Hit ignore)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Amaj7[/ch]          [ch]F#7[/ch]
I    say, "no, no, no, no, no more"[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]
I  got you blocked, excited to never talk[/tab]
[tab][ch]Amaj7[/ch]
I    am so sorry for your loss (Haha)[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]                                                   [ch]Amaj7[/ch] [ch]F#7[/ch]
I feel so much lighter like a feather with you off my mind, ah[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]
Floatin' through the memories, like whatever[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Amaj7[/ch] [ch]F#7[/ch]
You're a waste of time, ah[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Bm7[/ch]
Your signals are mixed, you act like a bitch[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Amaj7[/ch]           [ch]F#7[/ch]
You fit every stereotype, "send a pic"[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]                                                   [ch]Amaj7[/ch]
I feel so much lighter like a feather with you out my life[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#7[/ch]
   With you out my life[/tab]


[tab][Bridge]
[ch]Bm7[/ch]          [ch]Amaj7[/ch]
Do-do-do-do, do-do-do-do (Hm)[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]F#7[/ch]
Like a feather, like a feather, like a feather[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Bm7[/ch]
You want me, I'm done[/tab]

You miss me, no duh
[tab]        [ch]Amaj7[/ch]                 [ch]F#7[/ch]
Where I am, in love where I'm at[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Bm7[/ch]
You want me, I'm done[/tab]

You miss me, no duh
[tab]         [ch]Amaj7[/ch]                 [ch]F#7[/ch]
Where I'm at, I'm up where I'm at[/tab]


[Outro]
[tab]           [ch]Bm7[/ch]
You want me, I'm done (I feel so much lighter like a feather with you off my mind) (Mind)[/tab]

You miss me, no duh
[tab]         [ch]Amaj7[/ch]                 [ch]F#7[/ch]
Where I'm at, I'm up where I'm at (Like a feather, like a feather, like a feather)[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Bm7[/ch]
You want me, I'm done (I feel so much lighter like a feather with you off my mind)[/tab]

You miss me, no duh
[tab]         [ch]Amaj7[/ch]                 [ch]F#7[/ch]
Where I'm at, I'm up where I'm at (Like a feather, like a feather, like a feather, yeah)[/tab]
